MAJOR_EVENTS: Successfully launched on May 9, 2024, marking China's first MEO broadband communication satellite deployment.
NAME: Zhihui Tianwang-1 01A
MISSION: The Zhihui Tianwang-1 01A satellite is part of China's first medium Earth orbit (MEO) broadband communication satellite system. It serves as an experimental platform for space-based network routing and switching, elastic capacity on-demand coverage, and long-duration inter-satellite laser communication.
OWNER: Shanghai Qingshen Technology Development Co. Ltd.
PURPOSE: To demonstrate and validate core technologies in integrated space-air-ground 6G communications and satellite internet.
summary: The Zhihui Tianwang-1 01A satellite, also known as Zhihui Tianwang 1-01A, was successfully launched on May 9, 2024, from the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in China using a Long March 3B/E launch vehicle. This medium Earth orbit (MEO) broadband communication satellite has dimensions of 3 meters in length and 2 meters in diameter with a span of 20 meters. It weighs approximately 2,000 kg at launch and is equipped with a 490 N engine for propulsion. The satellite is part of an experimental platform designed to validate core technologies related to integrated space-air-ground 6G communications and satellite internet services. Manufactured by SAST, the Zhihui Tianwang-1 01A serves as a critical component in China's first MEO broadband communication system, aiming to advance network routing and switching technology, on-demand coverage capacity, and long-duration inter-satellite laser communication capabilities. The mission is owned by Shanghai Qingshen Technology Development Co. Ltd.
